data.title: Omni Network Integrates Superstate Tokenized U.S. Treasury Bond Product USTB to Optimize Financial Strategy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Omni Network announced a partnership with Superstate, planning to use Superstate's short-term U.S. government securities fund USTB as part of its fund management strategy.
Omni Network will use USTB to expand its balance sheet, helping the team optimize its fund management strategy "while maintaining liquidity and flexibility."
USTB is currently a $274 million tokenized treasury product that provides investment exposure to short-term U.S. Treasuries. The fund allows holders to effectively manage capital and deploy idle assets to earn income.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 660 USDT with a 2.02% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2025, 05:12 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 660 USDT and is now trading at 659.450012 USDT, with a narrowed 2.02% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: OpenAI Considers Special Voting Rights To Counter Hostile Bids
data.description: According to Odaily, OpenAI is contemplating granting special voting rights to its nonprofit board to fend off hostile takeover attempts, including those from Elon Musk. The organization is considering this move to maintain board authority following its transition to a more traditional for-profit structure. CEO Sam Altman and other board members are evaluating new governance mechanisms to ensure control over the restructured company. This would enable OpenAI to counteract other investors, such as Microsoft and SoftBank, who are current supporters. Although no final decision has been made, the special voting rights would help protect OpenAI from hostile acquisitions by external parties like Musk. Previously, Musk made a $97.4 billion cash offer to acquire assets held by the nonprofit, including a controlling stake in its for-profit subsidiary.

data.title: Grok Voice Assistant Set for User Release in Coming Weeks
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 18, an engineer from xAI announced that the Grok voice assistant is currently undergoing improvements. The enhanced version is expected to be available to users in the coming weeks.

data.title: Ethereum client Geth 1.15.2 has been released, fixing the mainnet block creation interruption error in the previous version
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Ethereum client Geth 1.15.2 has been released to fix a bug that interrupted the creation of mainnet blocks in the previous version. This emergency update solves a regression in the beacon consensus engine that can lead to missed validator slots and potential financial losses.
The regression in the earlier version affected the consensus engine's handling of mainnet block construction because it did not take into account the lack of a defined MergeNetsplitBlock in the chain configuration. This change was introduced in a recent update to the beacon consensus engine, causing the mainnet to not be recognized as running under proof of stake, thereby undermining block creation and the expected performance of the network.
The developer detailed that the regression stems from the removal of a test method called TestingTTDBlock, which was originally added during internal testing to simulate merged blocks. By removing this method, the system no longer bypasses the reliance on total difficulty, which previously allowed the engine to ignore the normal fork order and inadvertently enable merges before the London fork.
In addition to restoring block construction functionality on the mainnet, this version also solves another issue related to network peer discovery. Discv5 and DNS-based peer discovery functionality, which was inadvertently disabled in a previous update (v1.14.9), has been restored and is critical to maintaining reliable network communications between nodes.

data.title: Grok 3 debuts: solving problems, creating games, and introducing a new search engine DeepSearch
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk opened the demonstration of xAI's chatbot Grok 3 on Monday, claiming that it is "an order of magnitude more powerful than Grok 2." In a series of demonstrations, Musk and his colleagues asked Grok 3 to solve a physics problem and create a game that combines "Bejeweled" and "Tetris." However, xAI said that Grok 3's reasoning model is in beta and is still being trained. Grok 3 also introduced DeepSearch, which xAI described as a new type of search engine and an early version of similar intelligent capabilities. Musk said that the voice mode is still a bit unstable and may be launched in about a week, but it is great. xAI engineers said that Deepsearch is our first generation of extensive agent tools, which not only helps engineers, researchers and scientists write code, but can actually help everyone answer questions they encounter in daily life. (Jinshi)

data.title: UN Official Advocates Exploration Of Digital Currencies For Human Development
data.description: According to BlockBeats, United Nations Assistant Secretary-General Kanni Wignaraja has called for an exploration into how cryptocurrencies, central bank digital currencies (CBDCs), and stablecoins can drive human development. Wignaraja highlighted that Bitcoin and Ethereum reached a market capitalization peak of $3.9 trillion in December, suggesting that a portion of these funds could be allocated to support education, healthcare, skill development, and job creation. She emphasized the need for digital currencies to support development while ensuring financial stability. Wignaraja also recommended that development organizations test cryptocurrency funds under strict regulation. The transparency of blockchain technology, she noted, can enhance accountability and curb corruption. Additionally, she proposed that the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) assist countries in establishing regulatory frameworks for CBDCs.

data.title: Binance Releases Changes to BurgerCities (BURGER) Token Economics
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance released the economic model change of BurgerCities (BURGER) token. The total supply of BURGER will or has increased, with an annual inflation rate of 6% to 12%.
